title: raybird/tao-of-coding
description: 這是一套專為 AI 代理設計的多代理協作框架 (Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework)，將開發任務的混亂轉化為有條不紊的秩序。

title: apecloud/Aletheia
description: Aletheia is an AI-native, Multi-Agent orchestration framework designed to automate the transformation of traditional Relational Databases (RDBMS) into rich, object-centric Business Ontologies.

title: Jame0077/mcp-code-mode
description: 🤖 Enable AI code generation using the Code Execution MCP Server, integrating large language models with the Model Context Protocol for seamless tool use.

title: mercurycontaminated-sandarac557/KnapsackRL
description: 🎯 Optimize exploration budgets in Reinforcement Learning with KnapsackRL for more effective trajectory discovery in Large Language Models (LLMs).

title: vijaykmr18/RagGpt
description: "A serverless-ready RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) web application built with Flask and OpenRouter. Allows users to upload PDF documents and chat with their own content using an intelligent LLM-powered assistant.

title: mrsk93/lexilift
description: AI-powered document ingestion and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chat platform

title: NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM
description: TensorRT LLM provides users with an easy-to-use Python API to define Large Language Models (LLMs) and supports state-of-the-art optimizations to perform inference efficiently on NVIDIA GPUs. TensorRT LLM also contains components to create Python and C++ runtimes that orchestrate the inference execution in a performant way.

title: roshini0108/InferSim
description: 🔍 Simulate LLM inference performance to identify bottlenecks and optimize models with InferSim, a lightweight and dependency-free Python tool.
